product: Databricks Genie app in Microsoft Teams (Beta) ​
tagline: June 10, 2026 The Databricks Genie app in Microsoft Teams is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: June 10, 2026 The Databricks Genie app in Microsoft Teams is now available in Beta. The app brings Genie into Microsoft Teams so users can ask data questions and get answers without leaving Microsoft Teams.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 10, 2026 The
